The cat danced with a cat  
to lively polka music,  
onion with chamomile,  
a pretty girl with a soldier.  

4.  
Our mom always says  
that she’ll put me in a sack,  
she won’t put me in there,  
I have cat’s eyes.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Do not worry, my wife,  
about what we will eat,  
we will kill a mosquito,  
there will be enough meat.  

2.  
We will put half of it in the chimney,  
boil the other half,  
do not worry, my wife,  
about how we will make a living.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Uncle Nimra bought a dun horse  
for half a fifth of a tolar,  
came home, grabbed his wife,  
danced the maděra with her.  

2.  
Our Mr. Matěj went out to the feast,  
went through the kitchen,  
and the girls there  
drenched him all over.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
A clumsy one went to dance,  
he tumbled over smik stok stotdrbok  
a stotdr of fish by the waters on the square.  

2.  
He tumbled, couldn't get up,  
they had to help him.  

3.  
In Komářice at the corner  
a girl stands on the corner.  

4.  
These boys from Dvorec  
lure girls to dance.  

5.  
They take the pretty ones,  
they leave the clumsy ones.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The gardener went into the garden with a shovel,  
dug up a bushy rosemary there.  
It wasn't rosemary, it was horseradish,  
the gardener threw it over the fence outside.

2.  
The gardener went into the garden with a shovel,  
dug up a bushy rosemary there.  
Was it rosemary, or horseradish,  
if you don't want me, my girl, don't come here.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
That wild duck,  
it flew from above,  
called out to Honzíček  
to plow deeply.  

2.  
And he plows as much as he can  
in that green field,  
the horses stop him  
and he cannot go anywhere.  

3.  
Go, Honzíček, go home,  
call the lady,  
to give the horses feed,  
and you a good snack!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Green grass,  
that is my delight,  
green grass,  
that is my featherbed.  
When it begins to bud in spring,  
I do not want to suffer at home.  
Green grass,  
that is my featherbed.  

2.  
Green grass,  
that is my resting place,  
green grass,  
that is my featherbed.  
When I feel like it, I sit on it,  
when I feel like it, I lie down on it.  
Green grass,  
that is my featherbed.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
A little man got married,  
he took a little fly for a wife,  
he sat her on a little bench,  
gave her a pear to suck.  

2.  
He built her a willow bed,  
so she would stand nicely,  
gave her a little violin into her hand,  
so she could play there.  

3.  
A little mosquito is thinking,  
he wants to get married,  
the little fly jumps after him,  
she wants to go to the wedding.  

4.  
The hen is squeezing the bagpipes,  
the hedgehog is whistling the dulcimer,  
the chick is blowing the trumpet,  
the dog is laughing at the deaf man.  

5.  
The little man is playing the little violin,  
the little fox is on the bass,  
then they go to look there  
at the merry company!  

6.  
The little man is dancing,  
and the little bee is buzzing for him,  
then, lads, girls,  
come also to that dance!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
A parsley bed,  
a poppy bed,  
don’t come to us, boys,  
into the house.  

2.  
A parsley bed,  
a millet bed,  
don’t come to us, boys,  
when there is dew.  

3.  
A parsley bed,  
a carrot bed,  
don’t come to us, boys,  
when it snows.  

4.  
A parsley bed,  
a cabbage bed,  
don’t come to us, boys,  
until Sunday.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
And that Jirka Kulmestrojic  
stays at Krausojic,  
stands on the shore, reaches into his pocket,  
has nothing there.  

2.  
And that Jirka Kulmestrojic,  
likes Anka, the one from Krausojic,  
she does not want him, the poor boy,  
because he has nothing.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
There was love, there was love,  
four carts of coachmen,  
now it is gone and will not be,  
like a tailor’s thimble.  

2.  
That thimble is full of holes,  
love falls out of it,  
don’t think, my Pepíček,  
that I will be your wife.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Which is a lot,  
which is a lot,  
who has a sweetheart at home,  
who has a sweetheart at home.  
2.  
Who has her across the fields,  
a sorrowful lad.  
3.  
He must go to her,  
even if he had to break his neck.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Dou, dou across the garden,  
Honza in front, Franta behind,  
dou, dou across the garden,  
dou and dou and dou.  
The music accompanies them,  
sometimes it throws both of them off,  
dou, dou across the garden,  
dou and dou and dou.  

2.  
Dou, dou, they sing,  
howling along with the music,  
dou, dou, they sing,  
howling at the music.  
Today it’s easy for them to sing,  
tomorrow morning they will yawn.  
Dou, dou, they howl,  
howling at the music.  

3.  
Dou, dou, show-offs,  
the musicians have to play for them,  
dou, dou, show-offs,  
howling happily.  
They are played for on the road,  
women at home scold,  
dou, dou, show-offs,  
Honza and Franta howling.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
When I walked past the green grove,  
a goat peeked out at me from the thorns.  
The goat looked around, spotted the tailor,  
with a needle, with a brick, with little knives.  

2.  
By Turna, the meadow is two strychy large,  
it is supposed to be mowed by morning.  
There are mowers on it, they have sharp scythes,  
my dear must rake behind them.  

3.  
I have walked across these hills and valleys,  
and my head has never hurt.  
Now my heart aches, in the deepest sorrow,  
because my Andulka has left me.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
I have a valach (gelding),  
a valach, a lazy one,  
he is grazing.  
When he has finished grazing,  
then he will carry me  
to my dear, my lovely,  
in a short time.

2.  
I have a mare,  
she has a white star  
nicely white.  
When I give her oats,  
I will saddle her,  
she will carry me  
to my beloved.

3.  
I have little horses,  
warm chestnuts  
that jump nicely.  
When I give them oats,  
I will saddle them,  
they will carry me  
to my Káča.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
I had a singing little dove,  
I carried her in my heart.  

2.  
I carried her in my heart behind glass,  
she broke the glass, flew out.  

3.  
This is a small bridge, it bends,  
under it is water, spreading out.  

4.  
There are little fish in that water,  
no one catches them, they are very small.  

5.  
On that hill by the guardhouse a boy is crying,  
oh God, goodness, I am longing!  

6.  
When longing comes, oh, longing comes, longing will be,  
it will not stop until the longest death.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
I am the fisherman who works with water,  
I am the fisherman who spends time by the water.  
I will sit in the little boat, I will go for the girl  
to the other side, that’s where I will get her.

2.  
When they go fishing in the Dolany pond,  
when they go fishing in the Dolany pond,  
I will go there too, I will fish too,  
I will catch a carp, splash it against my chest.

3.  
When they go fishing in the Dolany pond,  
when they go fishing in the Dolany pond,  
I will go there too, I will fish too,  
I will catch a pike, splash it into the bag!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Our little clover,  
you have a nice scent,  
in our field  
everything is buzzing around,  
you are turning green.  

2.  
A bird is flying, flying  
to our gates,  
there it sings sweetly,  
lifting its eyes to the sky:  
I would like a little parrot!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
It rolled, it rolled,  
a red little apple,  
where will you end up,  
my dear Anička?  

2.  
They rolled, they rolled  
two towards each other,  
you are as beautiful as I am,  
let’s go to each other.  

3.  
It rolled, it rolled,  
a red little apple,  
just don’t be angry with me,  
my golden little heart.  

4.  
I am not angry with you,  
but I feel sorry  
that you go to another  
across the green rye.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
May tree, green May tree,  
pleasure is angry with me,  
it is angry with me without reason,  
pleasure is angry with me,  
oh, woe, oh, woe, oh, woe!

2.  
I came under your window,  
you were tempting me, Nanynka,  
when I came to you, my father found me,  
I was beaten like grain, Nanynka!

3.  
I will not come to you under the window anymore,  
even if you begged, Nanynka,  
I have had enough of my father's anger  
and your kisses, my Nanynka!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Above Chválenice in a grafted tree  
there grow three roses:  
one red, the second green,  
and the third blue.  

2.  
If it were possible for me to pick  
one flower from that one rose,  
then I would think, my dearest,  
that I already have the whole world!  

3.  
The cuckoo cuckoos, the dove coos,  
birds on the alder.  
So you think, my dearest,  
that I am the worst?  

4.  
I am not the worst, give me the handkerchief,  
I will wash it for you,  
so that it will be white when you come to another,  
and invite me to the wedding.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Our tiny kitty  
caught a yellowhammer bird.  
Run, Káča, run,  
a wild tomcat is chasing you.  

2.  
Our tiny kitty  
caught a yellowhammer bird.  
Káča runs as fast as she can,  
the tomcat cannot catch her.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Oh dear, the little path is long,  
oh dear, the road is long.  
Which way, which way is the path  
to my little Janek?  
Oh dear, the road is long.  

2.  
Oh dear, the little path is long,  
oh dear, the road is long.  
The path is bad, then good,  
where have you brought me?  
Oh dear, the road is long.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Farmer, farmer, farmer, once again a farmer,  
he broke his ploughshare, how will he plow?  
Yesterday, today I brought a little patch,  
yesterday, today I sowed a little patch.  

2.  
Tailor, tailor, tailor, once again a tailor,  
he broke his needle, the most necessary one!  

3.  
Debtor, debtor, debtor, once again a debtor,  
he took flour on credit from the farmer’s measure.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
In the green grove,  
my dear one goes there,  
his horses are turning,  
his horses are turning,  
on a hempen rope.  

2.  
Do not restrain, my dear,  
do not restrain the path,  
along which he used to walk,  
when he loved her,  
his beautiful Ančička.  

3.  
It was always  
joyful for me to go out,  
when it blossomed,  
when it blossomed  
by the Čejky flowers.  

4.  
Now I have encountered  
a sad surprise,  
that I must let go,  
let go from my heart  
my delight.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
A flea was wandering,  
a louse met her:  
Where are you going, dear flea,  
where are you wandering?  
I am wandering to a party,  
to the shoemaker’s sleeve,  
I am supposed to be there today.

2.  
A flea was wandering,  
a louse met her:  
Where are you going, dear flea,  
where are you wandering?  
I am wandering to the millstone,  
to the miller’s cap,  
I am supposed to be there today.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The little swallow flies, flies,  
says that dawn is breaking.  
Go home, Honzíček,  
I cannot help you,  
I would be beaten, beaten,  
I would be beaten.  

2.  
I would be beaten, beaten,  
by my mother,  
because I did not mow,  
did not give the cows  
green grass, little grass,  
green little grass.  

3.  
You will not be beaten—  
you will not go to the grass.  
Dew has fallen,  
cold water,  
this is not a lie, not a lie,  
this is not a lie.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Stop, little sun, with the little moon  
above the innkeeper's yard,  
hitch up, Jeníček, the horses,  
we will ride with the Lord God.  

2.  
How can I leave the yard  
if I don't have a whip?  
Warm up, my black horse,  
so that my dear does not cry.  

3.  
And when we rode out of the yard,  
the bridge collapsed beneath us,  
wait, Svinenské maidens,  
you did not want to help me.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
A week ago today, yesterday the day  
the sun was shining,  
a week ago today, yesterday the day  
the sun is shining.  

2.  
The sun was shining,  
I liked it,  
a week ago today, yesterday the day  
the sun is shining.  

3.  
Across the lord's field,  
my dear lad,  
across the lord's field  
you may not go further.  

4.  
Across the lord's meadow,  
my dear dove,  
across the lord's meadow  
you may not go further.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Hello hello hey, what is for sale,  
master farmer,  
Hello hello hey, what is for sale,  
farmer?  
I have chicken leather, hanging there on a stick,  
it's not torn, it’s tanned  
for a cap.  

2.  
Hello hello hey, what is for sale,  
master farmer,  
Hello hello hey, what is for sale,  
farmer?  
I have a deer vest, there is nothing better,  
I won’t sell it, I’ll keep it myself  
for the feast.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Little stars, little stars,  
how small you are;  
you shine for me so nicely,  
you shine for me so nicely  
the whole night through.  

2.  
My dear little moon,  
shine for me nicely,  
just so I don't get lost  
when I go to my dear one.  

3.  
If I were to get lost,  
and go to someone else,  
who would I complain to,  
if not to the white moon?

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
I am the carter from Vejprnice,  
today I won’t sell anything at all.  
Neither cabbage nor poppy seeds,  
what’s the use for these people from Plzeň.  

2.  
Since you didn’t give me any rest,  
I will stand in the middle of the market for you.  
I am the carter from Vejprnice,  
I don’t care about Plzeň at all.  

3.  
I will drive on the road to Nýřany,  
joyfully calling out in all directions:  
Buy cabbage, dear people,  
while this cabbage still has some value.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
How that little grass, nicely green,  
how that little grass is nicely cut.  
Turn around, spin around, my dear heart,  
turn around, spin around around me!  

2.  
How that little grass, nicely green,  
how that little grass is nicely cut.  
Ančička was reaping it, she is still very small,  
I will wait for her until she finishes cutting.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The donkey driver once had a donkey,  
the donkey wanted to die.  
Houvyj ah houvyj,  
only you my little donkey,  
I will buy you a bassline,  
don't grumble, grunt grunt grunt,  
don't grumble!  

2.  
If you really want to die,  
tell me everything.  

3.  
To the girls, lilac eyes,  
nonsense to the chatty women.  

4.  
For example, we will give it to the string players  
and to the bone comb makers.  

5.  
We will give meat to the butchers  
and leather to the tanners.  

6.  
We dug his grave,  
on the grave we put a thistle.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The way to Rokycany is golden,  
all covered with blackthorn,  
the blackthorn blooms white,  
my Andulka, open up.  

2.  
Why would I open to you,  
when I am not your beloved,  
when I become your beloved,  
I will open to you like others do.  

3.  
Be jealous, black cherries,  
that my dear walks proudly,  
not proudly like arrogance,  
beware, he will be mine!  

4.  
In the silence of Černice on the little hill,  
a boy is mowing a little meadow,  
the grass is dry, the scythe dull,  
the boy cuts only what cracks.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
When we were passing through Račice, they called to the blacksmith:  
Get up, blacksmith, nail horseshoes to the horses,  
get up, blacksmith, nail horseshoes to the horses.  

2.  
What kind of blacksmith do you have, you neighbors from Račice,  
if he doesn’t know how to nail horseshoes to the horses,  
if he doesn’t know how to nail horseshoes to the horses.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The riders are across the water,  
the riders are across the water,  
how nicely their horses go,  
how nicely their horses go,  
my maiden.  

2.  
And I will join them too,  
I can’t watch over you anymore,  
I will join them,  
I can’t watch over you anymore.  

3.  
Blue eyes, go to sleep,  
so you can get up in the morning,  
so you can, blue eyes,  
get up in the morning.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Fly, messenger, fly  
over the Doubrava village,  
greet my dear,  
my lovely Andulka,  
that I am at the fair today.  

2.  
Since you are at the fair today,  
what have you brought me?  
I brought you the fair,  
the fair will sadden you,  
that you won't get me.  

3.  
Bought love  
is never lasting.  
True love is more lasting,  
given by God,  
tied with a ribbon.  

4.  
One word is better  
than many papers.  
Paper tears,  
a word lasts long,  
it is worth a lot.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
My dear Honzíček,  
you have a fine horse.  
Do not lead it to the meadow,  
my dear little dove,  
the steward will capture it,  
the steward will capture it.  

2.  
He will not capture it, he will not capture it,  
I am not afraid of anything,  
I will ride the horse,  
a fine gray one,  
and ride away from him.  

3.  
The Suchdol pond  
is very deep,  
wild geese flew over it,  
wild geese flew over it.  

4.  
They were not geese,  
they were herders;  
where have you gone,  
where have you gone,  
some boys?  

5.  
They were not geese,  
they were goslings;  
where have you gone,  
where have you gone,  
pretty girls?

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
She herded the little sheep from evening until morning,  
she herded the little sheep all day long.  
Oh, I always clip clip clip,  
she again stomps stomps stomps.  
She herded the little sheep all day long.  

2.  
She herded the little sheep near the green grove,  
she herded the little sheep towards Postřekov.  
I called: hali hali hu;  
and my dear said: heli heli hu.  
She herded the little sheep towards Postřekov.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Pepíček walked through the grove,  
Leading Andulka by the hand,  
He picked one, he picked two,  
He let one float away on the water,  
He picked one, he picked two,  
He let one float away on the water.  

2.  
Flow, little apple, wherever you wish,  
Just don’t get wet,  
Flow, little apple, down  
To my Andulka’s yard.  

3.  
When the little apple floated over,  
It knocked on the window:  
Come out, maiden, come outside,  
Your beloved is standing in front of the house.  

4.  
Why would I go outside,  
When I am not his sweetheart  
And he is no rose blossom,  
To spoil my world.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
It’s raining, raining, just pouring down,  
where shall we put the horses?  
Put them wherever you want,  
I’m holding on to the girl.  
Put them wherever you want,  
I’m holding on to the girl.  

2.  
Put them in the little garden,  
I’m holding on to my Marjánka.  
Put them under the window,  
just as long as we don’t get wet.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Sharpen for me, blacksmith, a dull plowshare,  
a dull plowshare,  
I will take the wagon beyond Domažlice,  
beyond Domažlice,  
I will take the wagon beyond Domažlice,  
beyond Domažlice.  

2.  
There beyond Domažlice, behind that road,  
there I will talk to a pretty girl.  

3.  
Sharpen for me the small one or the big one,  
I will take the wagon along the wide road.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Flippers, flippers, sparrow,  
he broke his toe.  
Legless climbs on wood,  
armless throws at him.  

2.  
Ginger, pepper, and spices,  
the farmer is God's creation,  
flippers, flippers, sparrow,  
he broke his toe.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
That Rokycany gate  
beautifully painted;  
whoever painted this gate,  
did not spare the colors,  
is now gone,  
the end of love.  

2.  
You Czech girls,  
have a good time here,  
just remember me,  
when you will be merry,  
that I was with you,  
enjoying joy.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The spinning wheel was getting married,  
the spinning wheel was getting married, -dlo ha  
an old wretch was taking it, -dlo ha  
an old wretch was taking it.  

2.  
All the birds were invited,  
except for the owl.  

3.  
As soon as the owl heard this,  
she immediately flew to the wedding.  

4.  
She sat down on a mushroom,  
and started playing German music.  

5.  
The first dance was taken by a sparrow,  
he pecked her entire thumb.  

6.  
Sparrow, sparrow, you are silly,  
don’t peck my little claws.  

7.  
If there were no guests here,  
I would break your bones.  

8.  
Since there are guests here,  
I don’t want to cause any trouble.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Behind our little barn,  
a sparrow sits, juchacha,  
a sparrow sits,  
a black crow flew in,  
gave him a slap, juchacha,  
gave him a slap.  
And I don’t want you, crow,  
you have black legs, hy hy,  
I would be ashamed  
to go to the pub with you, juchacha,  
to go to the pub.  

2.  
I will fly to the Danube,  
wash my feet,  
and you will go to the pub,  
sell a blouse.  
And I don’t want you, crow,  
you have a black beak, bu bu,  
and I won’t  
make a fool of myself with you!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Will you tell us, young men,  
where you take your little horses to ford?  
We know well and will not tell,  
where we take our little horses to ford.  

2.  
We ford them on the Danube,  
only their little ears are visible.  
We know well and will not tell,  
where we take our little horses to ford.  

3.  
Will you tell us, maidens,  
where you go to the little grass?  
We know well and will not tell,  
where we go to the little grass.  

4.  
We go there to the meadows,  
where the little grass grows with clover.  
We know well and will not tell,  
where we go to the little grass.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Oh, acorn, acorn,  
how heavy you are on the oak:  
under you the whole oak  
bends down to the ground!  

2.  
You always promised me,  
when you came to me,  
while you still loved me, my dear.  

3.  
You promised me, as is proper,  
swore on your soul,  
that our faithful love  
would never be broken.  

4.  
The love is already broken,  
already completely ruined,  
thrown into the deep water.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
For a long time, my lad,  
for a long time, my lad,  
you won’t come home:  
your horses are in the stable,  
they’re neighing from hunger,  
when will you go to feed them?  

2.  
Give them, my maiden,  
give them a piece of hay,  
so they can fill themselves,  
not wait for me,  
when I am not home.  

3.  
Give them, my maiden,  
give them a piece of oats,  
so they can fill themselves,  
not wait for me,  
my black horses.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Little grove, little green grove,  
little grove, little green grove,  
my pleasures are angry with me,  
my pleasures are angry with me.  

2.  
They are angry, angry, without reason,  
because I wasn’t there yesterday evening.  

3.  
There possibly was no evening yesterday,  
my lady forbade me.  

4.  
My lady, do not forbid me,  
I will talk to a girl in the tavern.  

5.  
If you forbid me, you will witness  
what I do, you will cry.  

6.  
I will join the army, as a dragoon,  
and I will sulk with all my friends.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Young men are riding from Žilov,  
young men are riding swiftly,  
their horses are pale,  
they have cheerful bells,  
their horses are pale,  
they have cheerful bells.  

2.  
The young men are already at Bříza,  
the young men are already in Bříza,  
their horses are neighing,  
where are you, maidens, where are you?  

3.  
The maidens come out of the yard,  
the maidens come out of the gate,  
they run to the young men from Žilov,  
they run to greet them.  

4.  
Each one to her beloved,  
each one only to her dear,  
for her red flower  
she receives a white scarf.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The road to Prague is long,  
to Stříbro is a dark forest,  
I will still look,  
I will still look,  
if my dear is traveling today.

2.  
He rides, he rides, he rides, he rides,  
on a black horse,  
he pins to himself,  
he pins to himself  
a little saber on his left side.

3.  
When he pinned his saber,  
he looked back at his home,  
he cried so sadly,  
he cried so sadly,  
until the horse neighed beneath him.

4.  
When his mother heard it,  
she immediately ran downstairs:  
Welcome, my son,  
who sent you to the army,  
what is the cause of the war?

5.  
The silver lord director,  
he is the cause of everything,  
he sent me to the army,  
tied me up with ropes,  
and even put a guard on me.

6.  
And that guard stood by me  
from evening until morning,  
as God gave the day,  
as God gave the day,  
now they are taking me to Brno.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Above Pušperek that little hill is green,  
on it sits a swallow, it is calling.  
I will go there to listen,  
to hear what the swallow will tell me.  

2.  
The swallow spoke about my beloved,  
that I must leave her, like the white day;  
like the white day, the sun shines,  
that my golden little lady is like a flower.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Around the little field is green grass,  
around the little field is a black forest.  
When the landlord went there for clover for the cows,  
someone had trampled the path by morning.  

2.  
What hurry from the forest, when there is soft moss,  
you can sleep as if you were in a little bed.  
The little square moon is happy about the kisses,  
it doesn't count what you got and what you gave.  

3.  
Our hen lays a lot,  
such a hen you should wring its neck.  
What kind of farm is it, if another plows with yours,  
such things are not worth an old quill.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Duckling grazed under that ditch,  
hou hou, under that ditch,  
found a little flute this long,  
hou hou, this long.  
This long, as I am,  
a little shirt with a sleeve;  
this long, hou hou,  
this long.  

2.  
Duckling grazed under that ditch,  
hou hou, under that ditch,  
found a little hemp stalk this long,  
hou hou, this long.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Wait, I’ll tell you,  
that you were on the piglet.  
On the piglet with a cucumber,  
wait, I’ll tell you about it.  
Girl, don’t say,  
say that someone else was.  

2.  
Wait, I’ll tell you,  
you were on the piglet.  
Ah, I’ll tell you this,  
that you used to go to the garden!  
Dear, don’t say,  
say: Someone else used to!

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Under our little house above the courtyard  
Honzíček rides with the black horse.  
Terezka is looking out, opening the gate for him,  
come on, hurry.  

2.  
Just come, come, my joy,  
comfort my saddened little heart.  
Many cause sorrow, no one brings comfort,  
come on, hurry.  

3.  
Above our little garden the nightingale sings,  
my dear Honzíček is gathering flowers.  
I no longer have to wait, I'll ask for kisses,  
come on, hurry.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
The occasional little patch  
is the sound of our little gate,  
where I convinced Pepíček.  
If only I had curly hair,  
I would have woven a red ribbon through it.

2.  
Occasional little gate, you are all guilty,  
why didn’t you creak even a little?  
He wouldn’t have taken him away from my window,  
he wouldn’t have taken him away from people.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
That green village green of Dunov,  
a lovely girl walks along it;  
she walks, she walks, she will keep walking,  
as long as the village green stays green.  

2.  
That village green of Dunov in a beautiful valley,  
what is destined for me will not pass me by;  
it will not pass, it cannot pass,  
I have a boy there, he is like a rose.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.
There is a wide meadow over there,  
there is a wide meadow over there,  
on it the grass is tall,  
on it the grass is tall.  
2.  
There is nothing in that meadow,  
only that little garden made of stones.  
3.  
And in that garden an apple tree,  
planted there by my lady.  
4.  
She planted it nicely, deep down,  
so it would bear fruit within a year.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Water flows, little water, water, little water  
from the dam into the pond,  
water flows, little water, water, little water  
down from the dam.  
How could I, for you, my pleasure,  
how could I forget you, you, you, you.  

2.  
How could I, you, you, you,  
my pleasure,  
how could I forget you, you, you, you.  
The water has washed away, it took you with it,  
left me here alone, all alone, alone, all alone.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Boys from Třemošná, they are proud of themselves,  
they poked spices under the black cherry tree,  
dried them on the stove, ground them in a bowl,  
gave them to the dolls so they would like them,  
gave them to the dolls so they would like them.  

2.  
One of them poked the spices for nothing,  
the dolls would have all died.  
The other one knew this and did not say it,  
he would have taken his Nanynka to the doctor.  

3.  
Boys from Třemošná wanted to marry,  
but they did not know how to woo maidens.  
They came to consult the old village woman,  
for you, young men, the best is a rake.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
By our little door,  
by our gate,  
a nightingale sings there  
many times during the night.  
He sings beautifully there,  
it just echoes  
many times during the night.  

2.  
Sing, nightingale,  
by our gate,  
that I don’t have to worry  
about my beloved.  
He will come to us again,  
he will love me  
many, many times.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.
It’s just a little while until day,  
come, my dear, see me off  
to that pond by the dam,  
come, my dear, see me off, it’s time!  

2.
I would gladly do it from my heart,  
but my lady  
forbids me from having what my little heart loves.  

3.
And you, dear sir,  
I kindly ask you this:  
Give me your little daughter,  
I carry her in my heart day and night.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Play, little bagpiper, play, play,  
or give me your bagpipes, bagpipes,  
or give me your bagpipes.  
Tai dytl tatý tyá  
tai dytl tatý tyá  
tai dytl tatý tai dytl tatý  
tai dytl tatý to uík  
tai dytl tatý to uík.  

2.  
Before I gave you my bagpipes,  
I would rather make you play once.  

3.  
The little bagpiper played like a humil,  
everyone understood the bagpipes well.

label: NEZAŘAZENO
translation:
1.  
Sing, nightingale, joyfully  
in our valley:  
what is destined for me by God,  
will not pass me by;  
let people say what they want,  
that they will take my beloved away from me:  
if my beloved wants me,  
no one will take her away.  

2.  
When I used to visit my maiden,  
the moon used to shine for me;  
when I returned home,  
there used to be daylight.  
She ran out after me to the orchard:  
Will you come to us soon, girl?  
When I don’t see you, my golden one,  
I walk around all troubled.
